cases.task: Implement a React component named UserPanel that fetches a user whenever userId changes and makes its async states obvious to the user. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Make state ownership, cancellation, and user-visible failure handling obvious.

cases.task: Implement a React SearchBox that keeps typing responsive while an expensive query runs in the background. Keep the answer concise but concrete.
cases.outputHint: Show how input stays urgent while result work is deferred or transitional.
